headline: Internet freedom declines for 4th consecutive year
context: Freedom House's Freedom on the Net 2025 report downgraded Malaysia's internet freedom score for the fourth year running, citing increased content controls.

cards.big: Malaysia's internet freedom score dropped 8 points since 2021
cards.sub: Content removal orders and DNS blocking increased by 45% in 2025

cards.big: CMA Section 263 empowers MCMC to block content without court order
cards.sub: No transparent appeals mechanism exists for content takedown decisions

cards.big: Bill of Guarantees 1998 promised no internet censorship for MSC Malaysia
cards.sub: Subsequent laws effectively bypassed the original no-censorship pledge

cards.big: MCMC blocked access to 4,800 websites in 2024, up from 2,100 in 2021
cards.sub: VPN usage in Malaysia increased 62% over same period

cards.big: 4,800 blocked sites means censorship scaled faster than connectivity
Malaysia Internet Exchange reported 98% broadband penetration in 2025
